summary: A 14-second silent montage of border-wall construction: workers in hi-vis vests and hard hats setting rebar, a crane lifting a rebar cage at a worksite, and a person carrying a boulder beside the bollard wall. It is raw construction B-roll paired with a 'we build, we secure' caption, with no music or genre styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: Tweet: 'MASSIVE WALL PROJECT IN MOTION - 794 miles fortified and counting. We build. We secure. We continue.'
